action_mappings.release_ci_worker: release ci worker {} from artifact {} and make the worker available

register_artifact.description: register an artifact A as an artifact that is registered
preconditions: I can only register an artifact A as an artifact that is registered if it is not the case that A is an artifact that is registered and it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I register an artifact A as an artifact that is registered, it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered

assign_ci_worker.description: assign a ci worker B to an artifact A as an allocated artifact
preconditions: I can only assign a ci worker B to an artifact A as an allocated artifact if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and B is available and B is eligible for the artifact A
I can only assign a ci worker B to an artifact A as an allocated artifact if it is not the case that A is an allocated artifact
effects: Once I assign a ci worker B to an artifact A as an allocated artifact, it is the case that A is an artifact allocated to the worker B and A is an allocated artifact
Once I assign a ci worker B to an artifact A as an allocated artifact, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_ci_worker.description: release a ci worker B from an artifact A and make the worker available
preconditions: I can only release a ci worker B from an artifact A and make the worker available if it is the case that A is an artifact allocated to the worker B
I can only release a ci worker B from an artifact A and make the worker available if it is not the case that A is approved at the stage and it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I release a ci worker B from an artifact A and make the worker available, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a ci worker B from an artifact A and make the worker available, it is not the case anymore that A is an artifact allocated to the worker B and it is not the case anymore that A is an allocated artifact and it is not the case anymore that A is a signed artifact and it is not the case anymore that A is an attested artifact and it is not the case anymore that A requires a countersign and it is not the case anymore that the countersign for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that A has a vulnerability flag

schedule_attestation_job.description: schedule an attestation job B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only schedule an attestation job B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and B is available
effects: Once I schedule an attestation job B for an artifact A, it is the case that A is bound to the attestation job B
Once I schedule an attestation job B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

complete_attestation_job.description: complete an attestation job B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only complete an attestation job B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is bound to the attestation job B
effects: Once I complete an attestation job B for an artifact A, it is the case that B is available
Once I complete an attestation job B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the attestation job B

sign_artifact_from_attestation_job.description: sign an artifact A from an attestation job B
preconditions: I can only sign an artifact A from an attestation job B if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and A is an allocated artifact and A is bound to the attestation job B
I can only sign an artifact A from an attestation job B if it is not the case that A is a signed artifact
effects: Once I sign an artifact A from an attestation job B, it is the case that A is a signed artifact

sign_artifact_with_policy_engine.description: sign an artifact A with a policy engine B
preconditions: I can only sign an artifact A with a policy engine B if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and A is an allocated artifact and B is available
I can only sign an artifact A with a policy engine B if it is not the case that A is a signed artifact
effects: Once I sign an artifact A with a policy engine B, it is the case that A is a signed artifact and A requires a countersign
Once I sign an artifact A with a policy engine B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

attest_artifact_by_auditor.description: attest an artifact A by an auditor C for an attestation job B
preconditions: I can only attest an artifact A by an auditor C for an attestation job B if it is the case that A is a signed artifact and A is an allocated artifact and A is bound to the attestation job B and C is available
I can only attest an artifact A by an auditor C for an attestation job B if it is not the case that A is an attested artifact
effects: Once I attest an artifact A by an auditor C for an attestation job B, it is the case that A is an attested artifact
Once I attest an artifact A by an auditor C for an attestation job B, it is not the case anymore that A requires a countersign

attest_artifact_for_release_target.description: attest an artifact A for a release target B
preconditions: I can only attest an artifact A for a release target B if it is the case that A is an allocated artifact and A is bound to the release target B
I can only attest an artifact A for a release target B if it is not the case that A is an attested artifact
effects: Once I attest an artifact A for a release target B, it is the case that A is an attested artifact
Once I attest an artifact A for a release target B, it is not the case anymore that A requires a countersign

schedule_test_suite.description: schedule a test suite B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only schedule a test suite B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and B is available and A is compatible with the test suite B
effects: Once I schedule a test suite B for an artifact A, it is the case that A is bound to the test suite B
Once I schedule a test suite B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

complete_test_suite_run.description: complete run of a test suite B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only complete run of a test suite B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is bound to the test suite B
effects: Once I complete run of a test suite B for an artifact A, it is the case that B is available
Once I complete run of a test suite B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the test suite B

schedule_quality_check.description: schedule a quality check B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only schedule a quality check B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and B is available and A is compatible with the quality check B
effects: Once I schedule a quality check B for an artifact A, it is the case that A is bound to the quality check B
Once I schedule a quality check B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

complete_quality_check.description: complete a quality check B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only complete a quality check B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is bound to the quality check B
effects: Once I complete a quality check B for an artifact A, it is the case that B is available
Once I complete a quality check B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the quality check B

schedule_security_scan.description: schedule a security scan B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only schedule a security scan B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and B is available and A is compatible with the security scan B
effects: Once I schedule a security scan B for an artifact A, it is the case that A is bound to the security scan B
Once I schedule a security scan B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

complete_security_scan.description: complete a security scan B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only complete a security scan B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is bound to the security scan B
effects: Once I complete a security scan B for an artifact A, it is the case that B is available
Once I complete a security scan B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the security scan B

reserve_signing_key.description: reserve a signing key B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only reserve a signing key B for an artifact A if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and B is available and A is associated with the signing key B
effects: Once I reserve a signing key B for an artifact A, it is the case that A is bound to the signing key B
Once I reserve a signing key B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_signing_key.description: release a signing key B from an artifact A
preconditions: I can only release a signing key B from an artifact A if it is the case that A is bound to the signing key B
effects: Once I release a signing key B from an artifact A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a signing key B from an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the signing key B

approve_stage_with_tests_and_checks.description: approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a test suite C and a quality check D
preconditions: I can only approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a test suite C and a quality check D if it is the case that A is an allocated artifact and A is bound to the test suite C and A is bound to the quality check D and B is available and A is compatible with the validation stage B
I can only approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a test suite C and a quality check D if it is not the case that A is approved at the stage
effects: Once I approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a test suite C and a quality check D, it is the case that A is validated at the stage B and A is approved at the stage
Once I approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a test suite C and a quality check D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

approve_stage_with_security_and_vuln_rep.description: approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a security scan C and a vuln report D
preconditions: I can only approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a security scan C and a vuln report D if it is the case that A is an allocated artifact and A is bound to the security scan C and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with the validation stage B and A is associated with the vulnerability report D
I can only approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a security scan C and a vuln report D if it is not the case that A is approved at the stage
effects: Once I approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a security scan C and a vuln report D, it is the case that A is validated at the stage B and A is approved at the stage and A has a vulnerability flag and A requires a countersign
Once I approve an artifact A at a validation stage B using a security scan C and a vuln report D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

record_vuln_mitigation.description: record vulnerability mitigation for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C
preconditions: I can only record vulnerability mitigation for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C if it is the case that A is approved at the stage and A has a vulnerability flag and A is bound to the test suite B and A is bound to the quality check C
effects: Once I record vulnerability mitigation for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C, it is not the case anymore that A has a vulnerability flag and it is not the case anymore that A requires a countersign

grant_team_approval.description: grant team approval for an artifact A using a test suite B, a quality check C, and a team credential D
preconditions: I can only grant team approval for an artifact A using a test suite B, a quality check C, and a team credential D if it is the case that A is an attested artifact and A is approved at the stage and A is bound to the test suite B and A is bound to the quality check C and A is associated with the credential D

I can only grant team approval for an artifact A using a test suite B, a quality check C, and a team credential D if it is not the case that A requires a countersign and it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I grant team approval for an artifact A using a test suite B, a quality check C, and a team credential D, it is the case that approval is granted for A

grant_org_approval_with_countersign.description: grant organization approval with countersign for an artifact A using a security scan B, a signing key C, and an org credential D
preconditions: I can only grant organization approval with countersign for an artifact A using a security scan B, a signing key C, and an org credential D if it is the case that A is an attested artifact and A is approved at the stage and A is bound to the security scan B and A is bound to the signing key C and A is associated with the credential D
I can only grant organization approval with countersign for an artifact A using a security scan B, a signing key C, and an org credential D if it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I grant organization approval with countersign for an artifact A using a security scan B, a signing key C, and an org credential D, it is the case that approval is granted for A and A requires a countersign

finalize_countersign.description: finalize countersign for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C
preconditions: I can only finalize countersign for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C if it is the case that approval is granted for A and A requires a countersign and A is bound to the test suite B and A is bound to the quality check C
effects: Once I finalize countersign for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C, it is the case that the countersign for A is completed

Once I finalize countersign for an artifact A using a test suite B and a quality check C, it is not the case anymore that A requires a countersign and it is not the case anymore that A is an attested artifact and it is not the case anymore that A has a vulnerability flag

perform_attestation_after_countersign.description: perform attestation after countersign for an artifact A using an attestation job B with an auditor C
preconditions: I can only perform attestation after countersign for an artifact A using an attestation job B with an auditor C if it is the case that the countersign for A is completed and approval is granted for A and A is an allocated artifact and A is bound to the attestation job B and C is available
I can only perform attestation after countersign for an artifact A using an attestation job B with an auditor C if it is not the case that A is an attested artifact
effects: Once I perform attestation after countersign for an artifact A using an attestation job B with an auditor C, it is the case that A is an attested artifact

capture_attestation_token.description: capture attestation token for an artifact A using an attestation job B
preconditions: I can only capture attestation token for an artifact A using an attestation job B if it is the case that approval is granted for A and A is an attested artifact and A is bound to the attestation job B

I can only capture attestation token for an artifact A using an attestation job B if it is not the case that A requires a countersign and it is not the case that an attestation token is captured for A
effects: Once I capture attestation token for an artifact A using an attestation job B, it is the case that an attestation token is captured for A

capture_attestation_from_policy_engine.description: capture attestation from a policy engine B for an artifact A
preconditions: I can only capture attestation from a policy engine B for an artifact A if it is the case that approval is granted for A and A is an attested artifact and B is available
I can only capture attestation from a policy engine B for an artifact A if it is not the case that A requires a countersign and it is not the case that an attestation token is captured for A
effects: Once I capture attestation from a policy engine B for an artifact A, it is the case that an attestation token is captured for A
Once I capture attestation from a policy engine B for an artifact A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

sign_release_candidate_for_target.description: sign release candidate an artifact A for a release target B
preconditions: I can only sign release candidate an artifact A for a release target B if it is the case that an attestation token is captured for A and B is available and A is associated with the release target B
effects: Once I sign release candidate an artifact A for a release target B, it is the case that A is signed for the release target B
Once I sign release candidate an artifact A for a release target B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_dep_variant_to_target.description: bind a dep variant A to a release target C with a rc variant B
preconditions: I can only bind a dep variant A to a release target C with a rc variant B if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and A is department registered and A is compatible with the release target C and B is signed for the release target C
I can only bind a dep variant A to a release target C with a rc variant B if it is not the case that A is bound to the release target C
effects: Once I bind a dep variant A to a release target C with a rc variant B, it is the case that A is bound to the release target C

record_final_attestation.description: record final attestation for an artifact A using an attestation job B by an auditor C
preconditions: I can only record final attestation for an artifact A using an attestation job B by an auditor C if it is the case that A is an artifact that is registered and A is department registered and A is an attested artifact and an attestation token is captured for A and A is bound to the attestation job B and C is available
I can only record final attestation for an artifact A using an attestation job B by an auditor C if it is not the case that the final attestation for A is recorded
effects: Once I record final attestation for an artifact A using an attestation job B by an auditor C, it is the case that the final attestation for A is recorded

finalize_release_for_rc_variant.description: finalize release for rc variant of an artifact A
preconditions: I can only finalize release for rc variant of an artifact A if it is the case that A is registered and A is an artifact that is registered and A is an allocated artifact and A is approved at the stage and approval is granted for A and an attestation token is captured for A and A is an attested artifact
I can only finalize release for rc variant of an artifact A if it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I finalize release for rc variant of an artifact A, it is the case that A is finally released

finalize_release_with_target_signature.description: finalize release of an artifact A with target signature a release target B
preconditions: I can only finalize release of an artifact A with target signature a release target B if it is the case that A is department registered and A is an artifact that is registered and A is an allocated artifact and A is approved at the stage and approval is granted for A and an attestation token is captured for A and A is an attested artifact and A is bound to the release target B
I can only finalize release of an artifact A with target signature a release target B if it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I finalize release of an artifact A with target signature a release target B, it is the case that A is finally released

finalize_release_with_auditor_attestatio.description: finalize release of an artifact A with auditor attestation
preconditions: I can only finalize release of an artifact A with auditor attestation if it is the case that A is department registered and A is an artifact that is registered and A is an allocated artifact and A is approved at the stage and approval is granted for A and an attestation token is captured for A and A is an attested artifact and the final attestation for A is recorded
I can only finalize release of an artifact A with auditor attestation if it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I finalize release of an artifact A with auditor attestation, it is the case that A is finally released

action_nl_templates_indef.register_artifact: register an artifact {?artifact} as an artifact that is registered
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_ci_worker: assign a ci worker {?ci_worker} to an artifact {?artifact} as an allocated artifact
action_nl_templates_indef.release_ci_worker: release a ci worker {?ci_worker} from an artifact {?artifact} and make the worker available
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_attestation_job: schedule an attestation job {?attestation_job} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_attestation_job: complete an attestation job {?attestation_job} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.sign_artifact_from_attestation_job: sign an artifact {?artifact} from an attestation job {?attestation_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.sign_artifact_with_policy_engine: sign an artifact {?artifact} with a policy engine {?policy_engine}
action_nl_templates_indef.attest_artifact_by_auditor: attest an artifact {?artifact} by an auditor {?auditor} for an attestation job {?attestation_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.attest_artifact_for_release_target: attest an artifact {?artifact} for a release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_test_suite: schedule a test suite {?test_suite} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_test_suite_run: complete run of a test suite {?test_suite} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_quality_check: schedule a quality check {?quality_check} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_quality_check: complete a quality check {?quality_check} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_security_scan: schedule a security scan {?security_scan} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_security_scan: complete a security scan {?security_scan} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_signing_key: reserve a signing key {?signing_key} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_signing_key: release a signing key {?signing_key} from an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_stage_with_tests_and_checks: approve an artifact {?artifact} at a validation stage {?validation_stage} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a quality check {?quality_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_stage_with_security_and_vuln_rep: approve an artifact {?artifact} at a validation stage {?validation_stage} using a security scan {?security_scan} and a vuln report {?vuln_report}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_vuln_mitigation: record vulnerability mitigation for an artifact {?artifact} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a quality check {?quality_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_team_approval: grant team approval for an artifact {?artifact} using a test suite {?test_suite}, a quality check {?quality_check}, and a team credential {?team_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_org_approval_with_countersign: grant organization approval with countersign for an artifact {?artifact} using a security scan {?security_scan}, a signing key {?signing_key}, and an org credential {?org_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_countersign: finalize countersign for an artifact {?artifact} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a quality check {?quality_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_attestation_after_countersign: perform attestation after countersign for an artifact {?artifact} using an attestation job {?attestation_job} with an auditor {?auditor}
action_nl_templates_indef.capture_attestation_token: capture attestation token for an artifact {?artifact} using an attestation job {?attestation_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.capture_attestation_from_policy_engine: capture attestation from a policy engine {?policy_engine} for an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.sign_release_candidate_for_target: sign release candidate an artifact {?artifact} for a release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_dep_variant_to_target: bind a dep variant {?dep_variant} to a release target {?release_target} with a rc variant {?rc_variant}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_final_attestation: record final attestation for an artifact {?artifact} using an attestation job {?attestation_job} by an auditor {?auditor}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_for_rc_variant: finalize release for rc variant of an artifact {?artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_with_target_signature: finalize release of an artifact {?artifact} with target signature a release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_with_auditor_attestatio: finalize release of an artifact {?artifact} with auditor attestation

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a domain object is also a object

Everything that is a artifact or a ci worker or a validation stage or a quality check or a test suite or a security scan or a attestation job or a policy engine or a release target or a auditor or a vuln report or a signing key or a credential is also a domain object
Everything that is a team credential or a org credential is also a credential
Everything that is a rc variant or a dep variant is also a artifact
